name: spark-plug
title: Spark Plug
description: Launch Claude Code sessions in your worktrees — start new named sessions or resume existing ones.
author: kylescudder

commands.name: list-worktrees
commands.title: List Worktrees
commands.subtitle: Spark Plug
commands.description: Browse worktrees and start or resume Claude Code sessions

preferences.name: worktreesRoot
preferences.title: Worktrees Folder
preferences.description: Root folder containing your worktrees (supports ~ expansion)

preferences.name: sourceRepo
preferences.title: Default Source Repo
preferences.description: Repo that New Worktree branches from (supports ~ expansion). Pre-fills the form; can be overridden per worktree.

preferences.name: setupCommandTemplate
preferences.title: Worktree Setup Command
preferences.description: Command run in the source repo to create & provision the worktree. Placeholders: {ticket} {brief} {base}
